new.rule: GraphQL queries must conform to schema introspection contract; field names, arg types, return types match cached introspection. Field selection on missing fields, missing required args, or unknown root fields must surface DV-006/DV-008/DV-009/DV-010 errors with data=null.
new.source: Cross-suite usage in 050a-i family; supported by live probes 2026-04-27 against vcst-qa /graphql

new.rule: Connection-style queries with first/after pagination must return stable totalCount across pages; items must not duplicate across consecutive pages; localized fields are locale-stable when cultureName is provided; performance is response-time stable across repeated identical calls.
new.source: Cross-suite usage in 050a-i family; supported by 050h wishlist + 050a catalog patterns

new.rule: Resolver-level auth gating: protected resolvers must reject anonymous callers with errors[].extensions.code=Unauthorized + data=null; cross-store/cross-tenant requests by authenticated users must reject with extensions.code=Forbidden + data=null. No HTTP 401/403 — GraphQL error envelope only.
